isolation.boundary: Single GUI validator, localhost:3100 only, no code/schema changes

assertionResults.title: Theme selector in sidebar footer

observed.activeMarker: The active theme is prefixed with '>' in the sidebar list (e.g., '> PAPIERKLAMMER', '> VIOLET-INDIGO', '> EARTH').

clickActions.result: Theme changed immediately to data-theme='violet-indigo'; marker moved to '> VIOLET-INDIGO'; URL remained /WEA/dashboard.
Theme changed immediately to data-theme='earth'; marker moved to '> EARTH'; URL remained /WEA/dashboard.
Theme changed immediately to data-theme='papierklammer'; marker moved back to '> PAPIERKLAMMER'; URL remained /WEA/dashboard.

assertionResults.network: No requests captured during session; switching occurred via immediate DOM/CSS variable updates.
assertionResults.reason: Pass: sidebar footer directly shows all three required theme options, visibly marks current theme with '>' indicator, and clicking each option switched theme instantly as required by the updated contract language.

summary: Revalidated VAL-GUI-THEME-UI-001 as PASS against updated contract: sidebar footer lists Papierklammer, Violet-Indigo, and Earth directly, active theme marker moves correctly, and theme switches instantly on click.
